resources.string: Share a phone-connected USB device with a remote computer.
Plug a device into the phone via OTG. When a device is present, sharing starts automatically. The first computer that connects with your invite becomes its owner.
USB device: none — plug one in via OTG
Waiting for a computer to connect with your invite…
Copy this and give it to the remote computer so it can reach you and become an owner.
Computers authorized to use this shared device.
No owners yet — first computer that connects with your invite becomes the owner.
The next computer that connects with your invite will become the new owner (TOFU). Use this if a previous owner rotated keys and now silently fails to connect.
Owners cleared — next connection will be trusted
Could not clear owners — see logcat tag wsusb
